# Ubik

> Ubik is an AI operating workspace for perishable trade operators, starting with seafood importers, exporters and processors.

Ubik connects to email, WhatsApp, ERP, CRM, documents, meetings and market intelligence sources, then runs memory workflows and agents for trade operations.

## Core positioning

- AI operating workspace for perishable trade
- Built for seafood importers, exporters, processors and frozen-food operators
- Combines web workspace, local desktop context, memory workflows, market intelligence and enterprise-grade automation
- Designed for RFQ-to-quote, PO ingestion, VMI, margin protection, traceability and operational intelligence
- Built by operators from seafood, supply chain and AI-native product teams

## Product

- Base: personal AI workspace for operators, with Ubik Webapp and Ubik Local included
- Enterprise: custom workflow automation for teams, with domain expert and forward-deployed product engineer support
- Ubik Local: included desktop add-on for local meeting recording and, later, hotkey-summoned desktop context bridging
- Supports 10+ LLMs including Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok and more
- Supports private, local and air-gapped deployments for enterprise customers
- Integrates with email, WhatsApp, ERP, CRM, documents, spreadsheets, meetings and market intelligence tools

## Buyers

Ubik is for seafood importers, exporters, processors and frozen-food operators who manage trade across email, WhatsApp, spreadsheets, ERP and CRM systems.

Primary ICP:
- $40M to $400M+ annual revenue
- 30 to 200+ containers per year
- Teams where inboxes and WhatsApp threads act like the real ERP
- Operators who need faster quotes, cleaner PO processing, margin visibility and traceability

## Outcomes

- Faster RFQ-to-quote workflows
- Cleaner PO extraction and ERP handoff
- Live market intelligence and import/export project tracking
- Compounding memory across inbox, meetings, projects and trade artifacts
- Lower operational leakage from slow decisions and fragmented context

## Ubik Local

Ubik Local is included with Base and Enterprise. Today, it records and summarizes local meetings. Over time, it becomes the desktop context bridge for Ubik: a lightweight, hotkey-summoned overlay that connects local context, meetings, browser activity and the Ubik Webapp.

## Security and data handling

Ubik minimizes what is shared with external LLMs. Models are used for planning, reasoning and drafting actions, not for bulk raw-data ingestion. Sensitive data can remain in Ubik's context layer, local workspace or private deployment depending on the customer setup. Customer data is not used to train third-party models.
